MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JAN-22-2025 IN 206 -- APPEARANCE BY JOHN MARSTON, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS SHARON C. DENG AND GOLDEN STATE PROPERTY LLC -- DEFENDANTS/CROSS-COMPLAINANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/24/25 IS CONTINUED TO 5/19/25 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. DISCOVERY TO TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS ATTY. MARSTON TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE BY END OF TODAY FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST FOR FILING PAPERS THAT MOVING PARTY WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO OBTAIN THE CONTINUED TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
